case_title: MEZA, JOSE J. VS ANDRADE, JOSE DBA WILLY'S HANDMAN SVC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY MEZA, JOSE J. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRADE, JOSE DBA WILLY'S HANDMAN SVC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRADE, JOSE DBA WILLY'S HANDMAN SVC.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ANDRADE, JOSE DBA WILLY'S HANDMAN SVC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MEZA, JOSE J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF MEZA, JOSE J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEZA, JOSE J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANDRADE, JOSE DBA WILLY'S HANDMAN SVC. PLTF'S REQUEST TO AMEND THE CLAIM TO $2,500 IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ANDRADE, JOSE DBA WILLY'S HANDMAN SVC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MEZA, JOSE J. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
